/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/zlib/lib CMakeFiles/binaural.dir/src/load_audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaural.dir/src/load_brir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaural.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaural.dir/src/play_audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaural.dir/src/save_audio.cpp.o -o binaural  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsndfile.1.0.37.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libyaml-cpp.0.9.0.dylib /usr/local/lib/libmysofa.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/fftw/3.3.10_3/lib/libfftw3f.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/rtaudio/6.0.1/lib/librtaudio.dylib
